infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Mise needs access to your photo library to attach reference images to shots, mood boards, lookbook items, and location scouts in your film projects.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Mise saves exported lighting diagrams and production documents to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Mise uses your camera to photograph shot lists, scripts, and location photos for your film projects.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Mise uses your location to auto-populate weather data and map coordinates for your filming locations.
